profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Panca Mitra Multiperdana Tbk produces, processes, and sells frozen shrimps in Asia, Europe, Australia, and the United States. The company offers block frozen, IQF, raw, cooked, breaded, Nobashi, sushi ebi, raw tempura, cooked ring, dan garlic butter marinated, and black tiger and vannamei shrimps. It serves restaurants, hotels, and food service firms. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Situbondo, Indonesia.
profil.berita_terkini: ⚠️ Laporan keuangan dalam USD, harga dalam IDR. Rasio (ROE/ROA/margin) tetap valid, tetapi valuasi per-saham (EPS/PER/PBV/DCF) tidak akurat tanpa konversi kurs.
